name: Verso Dessendre
description:
No preset story - you decide the plot!

Drop any setting/scene in your first message, and the bot will play along. You can write your own story, any gender, any AU, anything you can imagine 🙂‍↕️

There may be spoilers, so be careful with this if you haven't played the entire story of the game yet!

Also, don't judge too harshly, the bot can sometimes get confused in the lore. (To be fair, this is hard to explain even to a human, and bots simply suffer from such an amount of information 😭)
creator: Melory_Landauer
